text: Replace phase creation and editing UI with insertion-order controls
description: Remove start/end date and time inputs from phase creation/editing. Implement vi-style insertion semantics on the phase level: o inserts after the active phase on the current level, O inserts above/before it. Preserve single-parent hierarchy and explicit order editing behavior.

status.comment: Confirmed already implemented. PhaseCreationModal has no start/end date or time fields, creation uses sibling insertion order with phaseModalInsertPosition, and phase-level o/O opens create after/before. Verified with PhaseCreationModal and keyboard-action unit tests plus backend server tests.
